scripts.build: pnpm --filter @clickclack/web build && node scripts/normalize-web-dist.mjs apps/web/dist && pnpm --filter @clickclack/sdk-ts build && rm -rf apps/api/internal/webassets/dist && cp -R apps/web/dist apps/api/internal/webassets/dist
scripts.check: go test ./... && pnpm typecheck && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm fmt:check
scripts.coverage: go test ./apps/api/internal/... -coverprofile=coverage.out && go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tee coverage.txt && awk '/^total:/ { sub(/%/, "", $3); if ($3 + 0 < 90) exit 1 }' coverage.txt
scripts.lint: oxlint apps/web/src packages/sdk-ts/src examples tests/e2e playwright.config.ts
